name: Patter
description: Open-source voice-AI SDK. The Vapi/Retell alternative for builders who want to own the stack. Give your AI agent a phone number in 4 lines — Python and TypeScript, MIT licensed, Twilio, Telnyx, and Plivo.
summaryZh: Open-source voice-AI SDK. The Vapi/Retell alternative for builders who want to own the stack. Give your AI agent a phone number in 4 lines — Python and TypeScript, MIT licensed, Twilio, Telnyx, and Plivo. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
